name: N1 Technologies Inc.
summary: N1 Technologies Inc. is an employee owned hedge fund sponsor. The firm provides its services to individuals, trusts, investment companies, and retirement accounts. It invests across all sectors, geographies, asset classes, and investment instruments. The firm employs long/short and a long-only strategies along with quantitative and fundamental analysis to make its investments. N1 Technologies Inc. was founded in 2010 and is based in Menlo Park, California.
